title: Structured Programming
summary: 9618 AS — procedures, functions, parameters, and modular program design.
learningObjectives: Trace calls with local and global scope.

simpleExplanation.title: Modular code
simpleExplanation.summary: Procedures group reusable steps; functions return a value. Parameters pass data in; return sends result back.
steps: FUNCTION Name(x) RETURNS type — must RETURN value.
Local variables hide globals inside module.
Top-down design: main program calls sub-modules.

sections.content: **Structured programming** (11.3) is tested with **trace tables** across procedure calls. Track **parameter passing** and **return values** line by line.
